title: Review Final Handoff
description: Review agent output — the final pipeline artifact. Contains the review verdict, quality scores, and meta-assessment of the handoff chain quality itself.

handoff_type.description: Handoff type identifier. Always 'review_final' for this schema.

verdict.description: Final review decision. approved: ready to merge. changes_requested: minor fixes needed, no full rework. needs_rework: significant issues, routes back to dev agent.

summary.description: 2-3 sentence assessment of the implementation quality, test coverage, and overall readiness.

issues.description: All issues identified during review, including those already caught by the test agent (with resolution status).

category.description: Issue category for analytics and pattern detection across pipeline runs.

location.description: File path and line/function where the issue exists.

resolution.description: How the issue should be resolved. Be specific enough for the dev agent to act on during rework.

quality_score.description: Overall quality score from 1-10. 1-3: needs rework. 4-6: acceptable with changes. 7-9: good. 10: exceptional.

chain_quality.description: Meta-assessment of the handoff chain quality. This is unique to NeuralRelay — it provides feedback on the PROCESS, not just the code. Scores improve the system over time.

requirements_clarity.description: How clear and testable were the BA's requirements? 1-10.

dev_handoff_completeness.description: How complete was the dev's handoff? Were coverage_gaps honest? Were properties_believed useful? 1-10.

test_coverage_adequacy.description: Did the test agent adequately cover the gaps and verify properties? 1-10.

total_tokens.description: Sum of tokens used across all agents in this pipeline run.

recommendations.description: Process improvement suggestions for future pipeline runs. Focus on actionable changes: 'Add token refresh to CLAUDE.md constraints to avoid rediscovery' not 'improve code quality'.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this handoff was produced.
